861.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever performs ghusl on Friday, purifies himself thoroughly, applies oil, wears perfume from his house, then goes out and does not separate two people, then prays what Allah has prescribed for him, then listens when the imam speaks — his sins between that Friday and the next will be forgiven.'
861.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang mandi pada hari Jumat, bersuci dengan sempurna, mengoleskan minyak, memakai wewangian dari rumahnya, kemudian keluar dan tidak memisahkan dua orang, kemudian shalat apa yang Allah telah tetapkan baginya, kemudian mendengarkan ketika imam berbicara — dosa-dosanya antara Jumat itu dan Jumat berikutnya akan diampuni.'

862.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to recite in the Friday Fajr prayer: Alif Lam Mim, Tanzil (Surah al-Sajdah) and Hal ata ala al-insan (Surah al-Insan).
862.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa membaca dalam shalat Subuh hari Jumat: Alif Lam Mim, Tanzil (Surah al-Sajdah) dan Hal ata ala al-insan (Surah al-Insan).

863.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'The one who goes early to Friday prayer is like one who offers a camel; then the next one is like one who offers a cow; then one who offers a horned ram; then a chicken; then an egg.'
863.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang pergi awal ke shalat Jumat seperti orang yang mempersembahkan unta; kemudian yang berikutnya seperti orang yang mempersembahkan sapi; kemudian orang yang mempersembahkan kambing bertanduk; kemudian ayam; kemudian telur.'

864.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'On the day of Friday, the angels sit at the door of the mosque and record those who come first and those who come later. When the imam sits (for the khutbah), the scrolls are folded.'
864.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Pada hari Jumat, para malaikat duduk di pintu masjid dan mencatat orang-orang yang datang lebih awal dan yang datang kemudian. Ketika imam duduk (untuk khutbah), lembaran-lembaran itu dilipat.'

865.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'The one who goes early to Friday prayer is like one who offers a sacrificial camel; then the next is like one who offers a cow; then a sheep; then a duck; then an egg.'
865.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang pergi awal ke shalat Jumat seperti orang yang mempersembahkan unta qurban; kemudian yang berikutnya seperti orang yang mempersembahkan sapi; kemudian domba; kemudian bebek; kemudian telur.'

866.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Zubayr ibn al-Awwam (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We used to pray Friday with the Prophet ﷺ, then return and race for the shade under the towers of Banu Ghanm. There was only a little shade, and the sun was close to the walls.'
866.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Zubayr ibn al-Awwam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami biasa shalat Jumat bersama Nabi ﷺ, kemudian kembali dan berlomba untuk mendapatkan naungan di bawah menara Banu Ghanm. Hanya ada sedikit naungan, dan matahari sudah dekat dengan dinding-dinding.'

867.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salamah ibn al-Akwa' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We used to pray Friday with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, then depart when the walls had no shade to shelter in.'
867.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salamah ibn al-Akwa' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami biasa shalat Jumat bersama Rasulullah ﷺ, kemudian berangkat ketika dinding-dinding tidak memiliki naungan untuk berlindung.'

868.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aws ibn Aws (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever washes (another person) and bathes himself on Friday, then goes out early, sets out early, comes close to the imam and listens without interrupting — for every step he takes he will have the reward of a year's fasting and night prayers.'
868.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aws ibn Aws (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang memandikan (orang lain) dan mandi sendiri pada hari Jumat, kemudian keluar lebih awal, berangkat lebih awal, mendekat ke imam dan mendengarkan tanpa menyela — untuk setiap langkah yang ia ambil ia akan mendapatkan pahala puasa setahun dan shalat malamnya.'

869.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When you say to your companion: 'Be quiet' while the imam is giving the khutbah, you have spoken idly.'
869.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila kamu berkata kepada temanmu: 'Diamlah' sementara imam sedang berkhutbah, maka kamu telah berbicara sia-sia.'

870.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When you say to your companion: 'Be quiet' while the imam is giving the khutbah, you have committed idle talk.'
870.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila kamu berkata kepada temanmu: 'Diamlah' sementara imam sedang berkhutbah, maka kamu telah melakukan perbuatan sia-sia.'

871.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When one of you comes while the imam is giving the khutbah, or has already come out (to give it), let him pray two rak'ahs.'
871.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian datang sementara imam sedang berkhutbah, atau sudah keluar (untuk berkhutbah), hendaklah ia shalat dua rakaat.'

872.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that Marwan was giving the khutbah when he (Jabir) stood and prayed two rak'ahs. The guards came to stop him, but he said: 'I would not leave them off, having seen the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanding them.'
872.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Marwan sedang berkhutbah ketika ia (Jabir) berdiri dan shalat dua rakaat. Pengawal datang untuk menghentikannya, tetapi ia berkata: 'Aku tidak akan meninggalkannya, karena aku telah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkannya.'

873.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When one of you comes while the imam is giving the khutbah, let him pray two brief rak'ahs, performing them concisely.'
873.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian datang sementara imam sedang berkhutbah, hendaklah ia shalat dua rakaat yang singkat, melakukannya dengan ringkas.'

874.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that one day the Prophet ﷺ gave a khutbah in which he recited Surah Sad (38), and when he reached the place of prostration he came down and prostrated.
874.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa suatu hari Nabi ﷺ berkhutbah dan membaca Surah Shad (38), dan ketika mencapai tempat sujud beliau turun dan bersujud.

875.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ was delivering the khutbah and asked a man: 'Have you prayed?' He said: 'No.' He said: 'Then pray two rak'ahs.'
875.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ sedang menyampaikan khutbah dan bertanya kepada seorang laki-laki: 'Apakah kamu sudah shalat?' Dia berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Maka shalatlah dua rakaat.'

876.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ammar ibn Yasir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'The length of a man's prayer and the brevity of his khutbah are signs of his understanding. So lengthen the prayer and shorten the khutbah.''
876.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ammar ibn Yasir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Panjangnya shalat seseorang dan singkatnya khutbahnya adalah tanda-tanda kepahamannya. Maka panjangkanlah shalat dan singkatkanlah khutbah.''

877.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I prayed with the Prophet ﷺ and his prayer was moderate and his khutbah was moderate.'
877.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku shalat bersama Nabi ﷺ dan shalatnya sedang-sedang dan khutbahnya sedang-sedang.'

878.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver the khutbah standing, then sit, then stand again.
878.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menyampaikan khutbah dalam keadaan berdiri, kemudian duduk, kemudian berdiri lagi.

879.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Prophet ﷺ used to deliver two khutbahs, sitting between them, and he would read Quran and remind the people.'
879.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ biasa menyampaikan dua khutbah, duduk di antara keduanya, dan beliau membaca Al-Quran serta mengingatkan orang-orang.'

880.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw Bishr ibn Marwan on the pulpit raising his hands (in supplication during the khutbah). He said: 'May Allah deface these two hands! I have seen the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on the pulpit — he would not do more than point with his finger like this.'
880.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melihat Bishr ibn Marwan di mimbar mengangkat kedua tangannya (dalam doa selama khutbah). Dia berkata: 'Semoga Allah memperburuk kedua tangan ini! Aku telah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ di mimbar — beliau tidak melakukan lebih dari menunjuk dengan jarinya seperti ini.'

881.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw Bishr ibn Marwan raising his hands on the pulpit on Friday supplicating, and he cursed him and said: 'I have seen the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on the pulpit — he did not do more than point with his finger like this.'
881.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melihat Bishr ibn Marwan mengangkat tangannya di mimbar pada hari Jumat untuk berdoa, dan ia mencelanya dan berkata: 'Aku telah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ di mimbar — beliau tidak melakukan lebih dari menunjuk dengan jarinya seperti ini.'

882.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lean against a tree trunk before the pulpit was made. When the pulpit was made and he ascended it, that trunk cried out with longing for him and the Prophet ﷺ embraced it until it settled down.'
882.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bersandar pada batang pohon sebelum mimbar dibuat. Ketika mimbar dibuat dan beliau naik ke atasnya, batang itu menangis merindukannya dan Nabi ﷺ memeluknya hingga tenang.'

883.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lean against a tree trunk before the pulpit was made. When the pulpit was made, he moved to it and the trunk cried out with longing. He embraced it and said: 'Had I not embraced it, it would have cried out until the Day of Resurrection.'
883.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bersandar pada batang pohon sebelum mimbar dibuat. Ketika mimbar dibuat, beliau pindah ke sana dan batang itu menangis merindukannya. Beliau memeluknya dan bersabda: 'Seandainya aku tidak memeluknya, ia akan menangis sampai Hari Kiamat.'

884.iwh_en: It was narrated about a companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that he told the people the congregation had grown and the latecomers could hardly hear the Prophet's speech. They said: 'O Messenger of Allah, the congregation has grown and latecomers cannot hear your speech.' He said: 'What do you wish?' So a pulpit was sent and he ascended it.
884.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan tentang seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia memberitahu orang-orang bahwa jamaah telah bertambah dan orang-orang yang terlambat hampir tidak dapat mendengar ucapan Nabi. Mereka berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, jamaah telah bertambah dan yang terlambat tidak dapat mendengar ucapanmu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Apa yang kalian inginkan?' Maka sebuah mimbar dikirim dan beliau naik ke atasnya.

885.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'man ibn Bishr al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'What did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite on Friday after Surah al-Jumu'ah?' He said: 'Hal ataka hadith al-Ghashiyah (Surah al-Ghashiyah).'
885.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'man ibn Bishr al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Apa yang biasa dibaca Rasulullah ﷺ pada hari Jumat setelah Surah al-Jumu'ah?' Dia berkata: 'Hal ataka hadith al-Ghashiyah (Surah al-Ghashiyah).'

886.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'man ibn Bishr al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked: 'What did the Prophet ﷺ recite on Friday along with the surah that mentions Friday?' He said: 'He used to recite along with it Hal ataka hadith al-Ghashiyah (Surah al-Ghashiyah).'
886.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'man ibn Bishr al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya: 'Apa yang Nabi ﷺ baca pada hari Jumat beserta surah yang menyebut Jumat?' Dia berkata: 'Beliau biasa membaca beserta itu Hal ataka hadith al-Ghashiyah (Surah al-Ghashiyah).'

887.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Nu'man ibn Bashir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Prophet ﷺ used to recite in the two Eid prayers and Friday: Sabbih isma Rabbik al-A'la (Surah al-A'la) and Hal ataka hadith al-Ghashiyah (Surah al-Ghashiyah).'
887.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Nu'man ibn Bashir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ biasa membaca dalam dua shalat Eid dan Jumat: Sabbih isma Rabbik al-A'la (Surah al-A'la) dan Hal ataka hadith al-Ghashiyah (Surah al-Ghashiyah).'

888.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'In it (Friday) there is an hour in which no Muslim servant asks Allah for anything good except that Allah grants it to him.'
888.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Di dalamnya (Jumat) terdapat suatu saat di mana tidak ada hamba Muslim yang meminta kepada Allah sesuatu yang baik kecuali Allah mengabulkannya untuknya.'

889.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar and Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with them) that they heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say on the steps of his pulpit: 'Either people stop neglecting the Friday prayers or Allah will seal their hearts and they will be among the heedless.'
889.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar dan Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa mereka mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda di anak tangga mimbarnya: 'Hendaklah orang-orang berhenti meninggalkan shalat Jumat atau Allah akan mengunci hati mereka dan mereka akan menjadi orang-orang yang lalai.'

890.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Ja'd al-Damri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Whoever abandons three Fridays out of negligence, Allah will seal his heart.'
890.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Ja'd al-Damri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang meninggalkan tiga Jumat karena kelalaian, Allah akan mengunci hatinya.'

891.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aws ibn Aws (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'The best of your days is Friday: in it Adam was created, in it he died, in it the trumpet will be blown, and in it the swoon will occur. So send blessings upon me abundantly that day, for your blessings are presented to me.'
891.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aws ibn Aws (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hari terbaik dari hari-hari kalian adalah hari Jumat: di dalamnya Adam diciptakan, di dalamnya ia meninggal, di dalamnya sangkakala akan ditiup, dan di dalamnya kematian massal akan terjadi. Maka perbanyaklah shalawat kepadaku pada hari itu, karena shalawat kalian akan disampaikan kepadaku.'

892.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aws ibn Aws (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, how will our prayers be presented to you when you have decayed?' He said: 'Allah has forbidden the earth from consuming the bodies of the prophets.'
892.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aws ibn Aws (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, bagaimana shalawat kami akan disampaikan kepadamu ketika engkau telah hancur?' Beliau bersabda: 'Allah telah melarang bumi dari mengonsumsi tubuh para nabi.'

893.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray two rak'ahs after Friday prayer at home.
893.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat dua rakaat setelah shalat Jumat di rumahnya.

894.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ would pray two rak'ahs at home after Friday.
894.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat dua rakaat di rumah setelah Jumat.

895.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Whoever among you wishes to pray after Friday, let him pray four rak'ahs.'
895.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa di antara kalian yang ingin shalat setelah Jumat, hendaklah ia shalat empat rakaat.'

896.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kharijah ibn Hudhafah al-Adawi (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out to us and said: Allah has supplemented you with a prayer that is better for you than red camels — it is the Witr prayer. Allah has appointed it for you between Isha and the rising of dawn.'
896.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Kharijah ibn Hudhafah al-Adawi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ keluar menemui kami dan bersabda: Allah telah menambahkan kepada kalian sebuah shalat yang lebih baik bagi kalian dari unta merah — yaitu shalat Witir. Allah telah menetapkannya bagi kalian antara Isya dan terbitnya fajar.'

897.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubadah ibn al-Samit (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from Syria who had been a companion claimed that the Witr prayer was obligatory. Al-Mukhdaji came to Ubadah ibn al-Samit and told him. Ubadah said: 'He lied. I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: Five prayers which Allah has prescribed for His servants...' and the man said he would not perform extra prayers. The Prophet said: 'He will enter Paradise.' Ubadah said: 'The Witr is not obligatory.'
897.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubadah ibn al-Samit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki dari Syam yang pernah menjadi sahabat mengklaim bahwa shalat Witir adalah wajib. Al-Mukhdaji datang kepada Ubadah ibn al-Samit dan memberitahunya. Ubadah berkata: 'Dia berbohong. Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Lima shalat yang Allah wajibkan bagi hamba-hamba-Nya...' dan laki-laki itu berkata ia tidak akan mengerjakan shalat tambahan. Nabi bersabda: 'Dia akan masuk surga.' Ubadah berkata: 'Witir tidak wajib.'

898.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ informed a man about the obligations of Islam including the five prayers and fasting. The man said: 'By the One who honored you, I will not do voluntary acts and I will not fall short of what Allah has made obligatory.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'He has succeeded if he is truthful.'
898.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberitahu seorang laki-laki tentang kewajiban-kewajiban Islam termasuk lima shalat dan puasa. Laki-laki itu berkata: 'Demi Dzat yang memuliakanmu, aku tidak akan melakukan amalan sunnah dan aku tidak akan kurang dari apa yang Allah wajibkan.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Dia berhasil jika dia jujur.'

899.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Witr is not an obligation like the prescribed prayers, but it is a sunnah that the Prophet ﷺ established, so do not abandon it.'
899.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Witir bukan kewajiban seperti shalat-shalat yang diwajibkan, tetapi merupakan sunnah yang Nabi ﷺ tegakkan, maka janganlah kalian meninggalkannya.'

900.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Allah is Witr (odd, single) and He loves what is odd (witr).'
900.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah adalah Witir (ganjil, tunggal) dan Dia mencintai yang ganjil (witir).'

901.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray thirteen rak'ahs at night — eight rak'ahs and witr and two rak'ahs while seated.
901.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat tiga belas rakaat di malam hari — delapan rakaat dan witir dan dua rakaat dalam keadaan duduk.

902.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Perform Witr with five (rak'ahs); if you cannot, then three; and if you cannot, then one.'
902.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kerjakan Witir dengan lima (rakaat); jika tidak bisa, maka tiga; dan jika tidak bisa, maka satu.'

903.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When one of you fears the approach of Fajr, let him pray one rak'ah to make odd what he has already prayed.'
903.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian takut Subuh akan tiba, hendaklah ia shalat satu rakaat untuk menjadikan ganjil apa yang telah ia shalat.'

904.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray between Isha and Fajr eleven rak'ahs, giving salam after every two rak'ahs, and concluding with one Witr. He would lie on his right side until the muezzin came to call Fajr prayer.
904.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat antara Isya dan Subuh sebelas rakaat, memberi salam setelah setiap dua rakaat, dan menutup dengan satu rakaat Witir. Beliau berbaring pada sisi kanannya hingga muadzin datang untuk memanggil shalat Subuh.

905.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to recite in Witr three rak'ahs: Sabbih isma Rabbik al-A'la (al-A'la) in the first, Qul ya ayyuhal kafirun (al-Kafirun) in the second, and Qul huwa Allahu ahad (al-Ikhlas) in the third.
905.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa membaca dalam Witir tiga rakaat: Sabbih isma Rabbik al-A'la (al-A'la) pada rakaat pertama, Qul ya ayyuhal kafirun (al-Kafirun) pada rakaat kedua, dan Qul huwa Allahu ahad (al-Ikhlas) pada rakaat ketiga.

906.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Witr at all different times of the night, and his Witr ended at sahur time.'
906.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan Witir di berbagai waktu malam, dan Witir beliau berakhir pada waktu sahur.'

907.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about Witr and said: 'Perform Witr before Fajr.'
907.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang Witir dan bersabda: 'Kerjakan Witir sebelum Subuh.'

908.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to recite in Witr three rak'ahs: Sabbih isma Rabbik al-A'la in the first, Qul ya ayyuhal kafirun in the second, and Qul huwa Allahu ahad (al-Ikhlas) with the Mu'awwidhatayn (al-Falaq and al-Nas) in the third.
908.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa membaca dalam Witir tiga rakaat: Sabbih isma Rabbik al-A'la pada rakaat pertama, Qul ya ayyuhal kafirun pada rakaat kedua, dan Qul huwa Allahu ahad (al-Ikhlas) beserta al-Mu'awwidhatayn (al-Falaq dan al-Nas) pada rakaat ketiga.

909.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to perform Witr while on his riding beast.
909.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa melakukan Witir saat menunggang kendaraannya.

910.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan ibn Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'He (the Prophet ﷺ) carried me on his shoulder and I took a date from the sadaqah dates and put it in my mouth. He said to me: Spit it out! Do you not know that we are not permitted to eat sadaqah?'
910.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan ibn Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Beliau (Nabi ﷺ) menggendongku di bahunya dan aku mengambil sebuah kurma dari kurma-kurma sedekah dan memasukkannya ke dalam mulutku. Beliau berkata kepadaku: Ludahkanlah! Tidakkah kamu tahu bahwa kami tidak diizinkan makan sedekah?'
